subTitle: Ask us anything about our organization and practices, we aim to provide you with the best information

faqs.question: What types of ways can I contribute to the band programs?
faqs.answer: Volunteering at our many events is a great way to contribute. Donations are always welcome and can help provide the band programs with many neccessities. Learn more about how to volunteer at our meetings or click the Volunteer tab at the top!

faqs.question: When and where exactly do the Band Boosters meetings take place?
faqs.answer: Band Boosters meetings take place every third Thursday of the month. They typically are run in the high school band room, but if we need to alter the location it will be noted on this site's calendar.

faqs.question: Can I join the Band Boosters? How do I do so?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! First, start by attending our monthly meetings and volunteering at our events. If you find yourself enjoying this, speak more to the Band Booster President after a meeting to submit your position!

faqs.question: How do I make a payment for my student?
faqs.answer: We enable you to make payments for your student right here on this website! Just click the Payments tab and follow the information there to complete your payment.

faqs.question: How current is the online schedule?
faqs.answer: We aim to regularly update our online schedule to reflect the events occurring with all of the band programs. If you notice any discrepancies with the schedule, feel free to reach out and let us know by going to the Contact tab at the top of the page.
